title: Migrate to fieldwork::theme
description:
Replace smallhold's inline theme.rs with fieldwork::theme module.

Changes:
- Replace crate::theme::load_theme_css() with fieldwork::theme::load_theme_css()
- Replace inline PAGE_CSS constant in activitypub.rs with fieldwork::theme::BASE_CSS
- Use fieldwork::theme::load_extra_css() for combined theme + custom CSS
- Use fieldwork::theme::sanitize_css() for </style> defense
- Delete smallhold/src/theme.rs (now provided by fieldwork)

Gains: is_safe_css_value() validation (was missing from smallhold).
